chapters.subject: History
chapters.title: The Advent of the Mughals
chapters.source: Sarrthi IAS · GS Foundation · UPSC Prelims 2028 · History
chapters.description: Babur's takeover from the Lodis, Humayun and Sher Shah Suri, the re-establishment of the Mughal kingdom at Panipat 1556, Akbar's Mansabdari system, Mughal land revenue from Zabti to Ijaradari, and Akbar's religious vision.
